description_long: This is a double-sink bathroom vanity cabinet with a large rectangular mirror mounted above it. The cabinet features two oval sinks set into a light-colored countertop, with two sets of double doors and four central drawers below for storage. Each sink is equipped with a metallic faucet and handles, and the countertop holds a small tray with toiletries and a reed diffuser. The cabinetry is finished in a light gray or off-white color, with metallic handles on the doors and drawers. The mirror is framed in the same color as the cabinet, creating a cohesive and elegant appearance. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for upscale residential or commercial bathroom settings.
description: A double-sink bathroom vanity with a large framed mirror, light-colored cabinetry, and metallic fixtures. Features storage drawers, cabinet doors, and countertop accessories.
description_view_0: Front view showing both sinks, the large mirror, cabinet doors, drawers, and countertop accessories.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cabinet, the thickness of the countertop, and the profile of the mirror.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the back of the mirror and the top edge of the cabinet, with no visible fixtures or details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the cabinet's depth and the arrangement of the sinks and mirror.
